benefits.description: planning to use for stomach issues caused by years of NSAID use

protocol_notes: User reports herniated discs at L3 and L5 pressing on nerves causing sciatica. Previously tried dextromethorphan (NMDA antagonist) with some success but discontinued due to urinary side effects. Planning to add BPC-157 before trying Cerebrolysin. Also interested in ARA-290 for neuropathic pain relief.
